category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Angola IANORQ market-access, NA/IEC safety, and energy-label requirements.

title.en: China-to-Angola Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入安哥拉：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入安哥拉：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Informational, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Angola IANORQ market-access requirements: NA/IEC 60335-2-24 electrical safety, import conformity inspection, energy labelling, R-600a refrigerant handling, and Portuguese-language documentation. Angola adopts IEC-based national standards (NA) and does not operate an EU-style horizontal regime (no RoHS/battery/outdoor-noise equivalents).
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与安哥拉IANORQ市场准入要求对照：NA/IEC 60335-2-24电气安全、进口符合性查验、能效标识、R-600a制冷剂处理及葡萄牙语文件。安哥拉采用基于IEC的国家标准（NA），且不实行欧盟式横向制度（无RoHS/电池/户外噪声等同规定）。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與安哥拉IANORQ市場准入要求對照：NA/IEC 60335-2-24電氣安全、進口符合性查驗、能效標識、R-600a制冷劑處理及葡萄牙語文件。安哥拉採用基於IEC的國家標準（NA），且不實行歐盟式橫向制度（無RoHS/電池/戶外噪聲等同規定）。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Angolan legislation, IANORQ national standards (NA), import conformity-inspection procedures, energy-label rules, and Portuguese-documentation requirements with qualified professionals and the in-country importer before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货前，应与合格专业人士及在地进口商核验现行安哥拉法律、IANORQ国家标准（NA）、进口符合性查验程序、能效标识规则及葡萄牙语文件要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨前，應與合格專業人士及在地進口商核驗現行安哥拉法律、IANORQ國家標準（NA）、進口符合性查驗程序、能效標識規則及葡萄牙語文件要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator exporters to Angola face four practical gaps: (1) electrical safety must align with Angola national standards (NA) that adopt IEC 60335-2-24 — Chinese CCC/GB 4706.13 reports map to the same IEC base but are not automatically accepted, so an IEC/CB-Scheme report path is recommended; (2) regulated imports undergo IANORQ-supervised import conformity inspection at entry (Luanda, Lobito), distinct from China CCC; (3) product and safety documentation, instructions, and labels must be in Portuguese, and an in-country importer of record is required; (4) energy labelling / MEPS expectations differ from China's GB 12021.2 China Energy Label and should be verified with IANORQ. R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned (220 V / 50 Hz grid matches single-phase China nominal), but charge and flammability documentation against IEC 60335-2-24 should be confirmed. Angola has no EU-style horizontal RoHS / battery / outdoor-noise regime.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱出口安哥拉面临四项实际差距：（1）电气安全须符合安哥拉采用IEC 60335-2-24的国家标准（NA）——中国CCC/GB 4706.13报告与同一IEC基础相对应，但不被自动接受，建议走IEC/CB体系报告路径；（2）受管制进口须在入境口岸（罗安达、洛比托）接受IANORQ监督的进口符合性查验，区别于中国CCC；（3）产品及安全文件、使用说明书和标签须为葡萄牙语，并须有在地进口商作为进口记录方；（4）能效标识/MEPS要求与中国GB 12021.2中国能效标识不同，应向IANORQ核实。R-600a制冷剂具备良好条件（220 V/50 Hz电网与中国单相标称一致），但须确认充注量及可燃性文件是否符合IEC 60335-2-24。安哥拉无欧盟式横向RoHS/电池/户外噪声制度。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱出口安哥拉面臨四項實際差距：（1）電氣安全須符合安哥拉採用IEC 60335-2-24的國家標準（NA）——中國CCC/GB 4706.13報告與同一IEC基礎相對應，但不被自動接受，建議走IEC/CB體系報告路徑；（2）受管制進口須在入境口岸（羅安達、洛比托）接受IANORQ監督的進口符合性查驗，區別於中國CCC；（3）產品及安全文件、使用說明書和標籤須為葡萄牙語，並須有在地進口商作為進口記錄方；（4）能效標識/MEPS要求與中國GB 12021.2中國能效標識不同，應向IANORQ核實。R-600a制冷劑具備良好條件（220 V/50 Hz電網與中國單相標稱一致），但須確認充注量及可燃性文件是否符合IEC 60335-2-24。安哥拉無歐盟式橫向RoHS/電池/戶外噪聲制度。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. IANORQ, INACOM, IEC, and primary Angolan legal sources are preferred; local PDFs are not accepted as canonical.
